trending_videos.title: RESIDENT EVIL – Official Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
𝙽𝚘 𝚜𝚠𝚎𝚊𝚝.
 
From the mind of Zach Cregger, director of Weapons and Barbarian. Watch the official trailer for Resident Evil. Filmed for IMAX – in theatres 9.18. #ResidentEvil

https://www.instagram.com/residentevil/
https://twitter.com/ResidentEvil
https://www.facebook.com/ResidentEvilMovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@resident.evil.movie

From the mind of visionary filmmaker Zach Cregger (Weapons, Barbarian) comes a thrilling — and terrifying — reinvention of the Resident Evil franchise. In an all-new story, Resident Evil follows Bryan (Austin Abrams), a medical courier who unwittingly finds himself in an action-packed, non-stop race for survival as one fateful, horrifying night collapses around him in chaos.
 
From Columbia Pictures and Constantin Film, in association with TriStar Pictures, Resident Evil hits theatres September 18, 2026.

Directed by: Zach Cregger   
 
Written by: Zach Cregger & Shay Hatten    

Produced by:
Robert Kulzer
Zach Cregger
Roy Lee
Miri Yoon
Carter Swan
Asad Qiz

trending_videos.title: Clayface | Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Meet the new face of Gotham. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters October 23.

DC Studios’ “Clayface” is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the cult favorite villain from Gotham’s rogues gallery.

Matt Hagen’s meteoric rise from Gotham street kid to Hollywood leading man is tragically cut short when a local crime boss’s actions leave him horribly disfigured. Abandoned by his team and with nothing left, Matt seeks out a cutting edge treatment that miraculously returns him to his former self… but also unexpectedly affects his grip on reality, spiraling him down a destructive path of all-consuming revenge.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James.

James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Mic

trailer_dominance.description: A significant portion of trending videos are trailers for upcoming movies and games.
trailer_dominance.actionable_insight: Consider creating content surrounding breakdowns, reactions, or discussions of popular trailers to leverage their high interest.

gaming_content.description: Gaming continues to be a strong category with content like 'Photomaly' and 'MINECRAFT WONDERLAND'.
gaming_content.actionable_insight: Develop content around new game launches or updates, or create engaging gameplay experiences to attract a gaming audience.

live_streaming.description: Live streaming is being utilized effectively as seen with '🔴LIVE | UNRELEASED SPONGE BREAK'.
live_streaming.data_point: 1 out of 10 videos is a live stream.
live_streaming.actionable_insight: Integrate live streaming into content strategies to engage with audiences in real-time, especially for music or interactive content.

major_studios.description: Major studios like Sony Pictures, DC, and Marvel are key players in trending content.
major_studios.data_point: 3 out of 5 top channels are major studios.
major_studios.actionable_insight: Collaboration with major studios or creating content that aligns with their releases can amplify reach and engagement.

individual_creators.description: Individual creators like CaseOh and Flamingo are also breaking into trending content.
individual_creators.data_point: 2 out of 5 top channels are individual creators.
individual_creators.actionable_insight: Focus on unique and niche content creation that can stand out against larger entities to capture audience interest.

cross-industry collaborations.description: With content from various industries trending, there's a potential for cross-promotional opportunities.
cross-industry collaborations.data_point: Content covers entertainment, gaming, and live streaming.
cross-industry collaborations.actionable_insight: Explore partnerships across different content types to reach diverse audiences and expand market presence.

niche content exploration.description: Niche content like specific gameplays or analyses of popular trailers can attract dedicated audiences.
niche content exploration.data_point: Niche videos like 'What Everyone Missed with LOKI' are trending.
niche content exploration.actionable_insight: Develop targeted content that explores specific aspects of popular media for in-depth engagement with niche communities.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
